title: chomelia oligantha
intro: Chomelia oligantha, also known as the smallflower Chomelia, is a species of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Chomelia oligantha include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Chomelia oligantha can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction for its medicinal uses.
